metadata.title: ns-dsl: a decentralized neutrosophic decision layer for global-state freshness in microservices (software)

creators.name: El-Ghareeb, Haitham A.
creators.affiliation: Information Systems Department, Faculty of Computers and Information Sciences, Mansoura University, Mansoura, Egypt

metadata.description: Reference implementation and evaluation harness for the article 'A decentralized neutrosophic decision layer for global-state freshness in microservices architectures'. Includes the neutrosophic operator/score panels, the ANTLR-based JSON DSL and rules engine, the decentralized act/abstain decision protocol, all baselines, the simulator, and the figure/table generators. Dependency versions are pinned and the generated ANTLR parser is committed, so no Java toolchain is needed to reproduce the results. RESTRICTED during peer review to protect ongoing work; reviewers obtain access via a private link; released openly upon publication.
metadata.access_conditions: Held under restricted access during peer review. Editors and reviewers of Scientific Reports are granted access via the private link provided to the editorial office. The record will be made openly available under the MIT licence upon publication of the article.
metadata.notes: Companion dataset (raw per-trial outputs) archived separately as DOI 10.5281/zenodo.XXXXXXX. Replace placeholder DOIs with the reserved Zenodo DOIs before final submission.
